news.t: Dimensional Lists Four Fixed Income ETFs and Announces Further Expansion of ETF Offering

overview.description: The Dimensional Core Fixed Income ETF (DFCF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks income and capital appreciation from a broad, actively managed portfolio of global investment-grade fixed income securities. DFCF was launched on Nov 15, 2021 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: Dimensional Lists Four Fixed Income ETFs and Announces Further Expansion of ETF Offering
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors listed today four active transparent fixed income ETFs and filed a preliminary registration statement for 10 equity ETFs.
